appDescription.message: By default, observes value-free request and cookie metadata on all HTTP(S) sites and analyzes terms and privacy risks locally.

companionOverlayDisclosure.message: When enabled, shows the latest analysis risk overlay in the website DOM on every supported HTTP(S) page. Sites can detect or cover it, and unknown does not mean safe.

statusCompanionOverlayEnabled.message: The companion overlay is on for all supported websites.

statusCompanionOverlayUpdateFailed.message: Could not change the companion overlay setting. Reopen the popup and try again.

companionSubtitle.message: The risk score from the most recently completed analysis on this page. It is not a real-time security verdict.

companionNotice.message: Colors and scores are rule-based analysis results, not legal advice or a security audit.

companionChecking.message: Checking for the latest analysis result.

companionUnknown.message: No completed analysis result is available yet. Unknown does not mean safe.

companionExcluded.message: The current site is excluded from observation.

companionUnsupported.message: This page type cannot be analyzed.
